heading: Rules and regulations; repeals
label: 5209 Rules and regulations; repeals
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to prescribe such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this chapter. All Acts or parts of Acts inconsistent with this chapter are repealed.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 509 of this title
